keys.description: The default Region ULID + summary for one tenant. Read by DefaultRegionResolver on every tenant-plane request that lacks an X-Region-Id header (the vast majority). Written on tenant provision + on any is_default flip; invalidated on RegionArchived / RegionDeleted for the default row.

The full active-region list for one tenant. Read by the tenant admin UI + by the `region.resolve_active` middleware when validating an X-Region-Id header. Small payload (id, name, slug, country_code, status, is_default).
One Region row (unredacted, including tax_config.registration_number). Read by the tax + currency resolvers on hot paths (every invoice + every price display).
The tax_config sub-object for one Region, isolated so tax-only consumers don't fetch the full row. TaxConfigResolver reads this.
The full `data/country-defaults.json` shipped table. Static artifact — parsed once, cached indefinitely. Invalidated on deploy (the cache key includes a hash of the file).
One country's defaults, cached per-key for O(1) lookup. Populated on first read from `rgn:country_defaults`.
A precomputed set of {region_id, name, currency, status} tuples used by Branch's `region_id` dropdown at Wave 2b. Warmed on tenant provision; kept small (< 20 rows even for Enterprise tenants).
Timestamp of the last successful ReconcileDefaultRegionInvariantJob run. Read by the health probe + the ops dashboard.
